## Copyright Originality Check

Before merging, confirm each item:

- [ ] **No book text**: PR contains no copied or closely paraphrased sentences
      from any textbook or copyrighted source
- [ ] **No book code**: All code was generated by agents from architectural specs
      referencing published research (not from any specific textbook implementation)
- [ ] **No book diagrams**: All figures, diagrams, and visualizations are original
      creations (made with Mermaid, matplotlib, draw.io, etc.)
- [ ] **Original examples**: All demonstration text, sample inputs, and datasets
      are original or from public domain / permissively licensed sources
- [ ] **Original naming**: Variable names, class names, and config names follow
      our own conventions — not mirrored from any textbook
- [ ] **Agent-doc review**: The agent-doc's "Core Intuition" section uses our
      own analogies and explanations, not restated textbook language
- [ ] **No source files**: No PDFs, .pages files, or personal learning notes
      are included in this PR
